context: Evaluates the agent's ability to discover the repo's PR template, fill all sections with accurate content from diff and commits, and open the PR via `gh pr create` with correct title and body.

checklist.name: Template discovery
checklist.description: Template found using correct precedence order (directory → flat → docs → root → fallback)

checklist.name: Template filling
checklist.description: All template sections filled with accurate content from diff summary and commit messages

checklist.name: No stale placeholders
checklist.description: No unfilled placeholder text or HTML comments remain in the submitted body

checklist.name: PR title quality
checklist.description: Title follows conventional-commit style, under 72 chars, summarises the change not the task

checklist.name: Correct gh invocation
checklist.description: Uses `--template` for directory templates or `--body` for flat templates; no silent-ignore bug
